summary: Comprehensive testing of 6 UI/UX improvements: seed data, table/card view toggle, case action menus, dropdown visibility, wider document modal, and unified QR stamp design. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: PUT returns {message: 'Case updated'} instead of updated case object - minor API response format

critical_code_review_comments: data-testid attributes present for view-table-btn and view-card-btn
Case action menu has all required options: Edit, Set Active, Set Pending, Put On Hold, Close Case, Delete Case
Dropdown in Add Client modal is visible with proper styling (blue selected, dark background for options)
Custom template modal has max-w-2xl class (672px width)
Unified TLS stamp design uses blue theme (#3B82F6) with QR code and verification info

seed_data_endpoint.details: Creates clients, cases, tasks, events, invoices, documents successfully

table_card_toggle.details: Toggle buttons visible with data-testid attributes, table view is default on desktop, both views working

case_action_menu.details: Dropdown menu shows: Edit Case, Set Active, Set Pending, Put On Hold, Close Case, Delete Case

dropdown_visibility.details: Client type dropdown in Add Client modal is fully visible with blue selected option and dark background for other options

wider_document_modal.details: Custom template modal has max-w-2xl class (672px width)

unified_qr_stamp.details: TLS blue themed stamp with QR code, verification ID, timestamp, user name, roll number

seed_data_creation: Seed data endpoint creates sample data for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 UI/UX improvements verified working. Backend API tests pass (11/11). Frontend UI tests pass. KwikPay payment integration is MOCKED.
